name: Yateem Foundation
mission: Providing food and shelter to displaced orphans in Syria to return to their original cities
scoreSummary: Too early to rate numerically. This organization was founded in 2024 and is shown as an emerging organization while it builds a public track record.
zakatClaimEvidence: The website "helpyateemusa.org" has a dedicated page titled "Zakat | Give your zakat to support the orphans - Help Yateem USA". The page content states, "Zakat ensures that individuals who are helpless, lacking basic necessities are protected from things such as hunger." Additionally, "Yateem Foundation USA's dedication to charitable support goes beyond meeting basic needs; we focus on holistic development and long-term sustainability to ensure that orphans and widows can lead fulfilling lives." (Source: https://yateemfoundationusa.org)

dimension_explanations.alignment: The alignment score of 35/50 is supported by the extreme urgency of the Syrian refugee crisis and the organization's Zakat-eligible status, which provides a medium fit for traditional Muslim donor priorities [1][3].
dimension_explanations.impact: The impact score of 14/50 reflects a direct service model providing food and shelter, yet it is constrained by a lack of available data regarding cost per beneficiary and overall program effectiveness [2][3].

baseline_narrative.summary: Based in the United States, Yateem Foundation USA operates specialized programs including Orphan Sponsorship and Seasonal Assistance Projects to support vulnerable children in Syria [1]. The organization is recognized as Zakat-eligible, allowing donors to fulfill religious obligations through its humanitarian initiatives [1][2].

similar_organizations.name: Helping Hand for Relief and Development

strengths.detail: The foundation provides <cite id="1">direct service delivery</cite> through village construction and orphanage management in Syria and Türkiye.
The organization is <cite id="1">Zakat-eligible</cite>, specifically serving the <cite id="3">fuqara (poor) and masakin (needy)</cite> categories.
Operations focus on <cite id="3">extreme poverty and underserved populations</cite> in active conflict zones.

strengths_deep_dive: Yateem Foundation USA distinguishes itself through a <cite id="1">direct service model</cite> that bypasses intermediary agencies to provide tangible infrastructure, such as <cite id="1">village construction for Syrian orphans</cite>. This approach ensures that aid is localized and specific to the needs of displaced populations. Furthermore, the foundation's <cite id="1">orphan sponsorship program</cite> provides a structured way for donors to provide consistent support to individual children, covering basic necessities in a region where <cite id="3">cause urgency is rated at the highest level</cite> due to ongoing instability.
rich_narrative.summary: Yateem Foundation USA is a humanitarian organization dedicated to providing <cite id="1">essential food and shelter to displaced Syrian orphans</cite>. The organization's primary objective is to stabilize the lives of vulnerable children with the ultimate goal of <cite id="1">facilitating their return to their home cities</cite>. Operating in high-conflict zones, the foundation manages a diverse portfolio of programs including <cite id="1">Orphan Sponsorship, Seasonal Assistance Projects, and Ramadan Food Baskets</cite>. Beyond immediate relief, the charity invests in long-term infrastructure through <cite id="1">village construction for Syrian orphans</cite> and the operation of an <cite id="1">orphanage in Türkiye</cite>. As a <cite id="2">Zakat-eligible entity</cite>, it serves as a vehicle for Muslim donors to fulfill religious obligations while addressing <cite id="3">extreme poverty and humanitarian crises</cite> in the Levant region. Despite its direct service model, the organization currently operates with <cite id="3">limited public financial transparency</cite>, as it is an emerging entity without a full rating from major evaluators.
